text.title: Figma vs Adobe Strategy 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for figma-vs-adobe-strategy-2026.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a renewal / consolidation decision affecting >5 seats?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — small enough for ops-level call, no ADR needed
DECIDE — vendor blocked by policy is out by default
CONSOLIDATE — write ADR recommending the cheaper consolidated vendor
STAY — record decision with revisit-trigger criteria
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
